sentences.english: I can talk on the phone, write emails, and eat lunch all at the same time.
sentences.korean: 전화하면서 이메일 쓰고 점심 먹는 걸 동시에 할 수 있어요.

sentences.english: Actually, studies show that multitasking makes you less productive.
sentences.korean: 사실 연구에 따르면 멀티태스킹은 생산성을 떨어뜨려요.

sentences.english: It's better to focus on one thing at a time.
sentences.korean: 한 번에 한 가지에 집중하는 게 나아요.

sentences.english: I try to single-task, but it's hard when there are so many things to do at work.
sentences.korean: 한 가지에 집중하려 하지만 직장에서 할 일이 너무 많으면 어려워요.

quiz.question: What does '한 가지에 집중하다' mean in English?
